description: Document in Arabic script, calligraphic. Likely a state document. The beginnings of 4 lines are preserved. The word "aʿrāḍ" appears. Needs examination. On verso there are lists in Hebrew script, perhaps of piyyutim (the hand is rudimentary and may be known).
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
